related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ᛇ Eihwaz
related.teaser: Eihwaz is the dark yew — the still pillar that outlasts the storm.

related.name: XXI. The World
related.teaser: The World is the mandorla of unity — the circle complete, the dance of matter and spirit fulfilled.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: IX. The Hermit
related.teaser: The Hermit walks alone into mountain shadow, lantern of wisdom illuminating the way of solitude.

related.name: Jet
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: ᚾ Nauthiz
related.teaser: Nauthiz is the narrow pass — the wise pressure that forges character.

related.name: Three of Pentacles
related.teaser: Three of Pentacles is the coin of earth — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.
